headline: Flight Delays Spread Across East Cost
summary: As of early afternoon on Sunday, more than 10% of the flights scheduled to leave New York's Kennedy and LaGuardia airports had been canceled, according to the flight tracking site FlightAware.  Overall, the site was tracking nearly 3,700 delayed flights in the U.S. and another 1,100 canceled flights.  Atlanta's Hartsfield-Jackson International, Boston's Logan International, Newark Liberty International, and Washington, D.C.'s Reagan National were also dealing with delays and cancellations.

Atlanta's Hartsfield-Jackson International, Boston's Logan International, Newark Liberty International, and Washington, D.C.'s Reagan National were also dealing with delays and cancellations.

headline: Flight Delays, Cancellations Spread Across East Cost
summary: As of late afternoon on Sunday, more than 10% of the flights scheduled to leave New York's Kennedy and LaGuardia airports had been canceled and another 20% delayed, according to the flight tracking site FlightAware.  Overall, the site was tracking more than 6,300 delayed flights in the U.S. and another more than 1,200 canceled flights.  In addition to the New York area, Atlanta's Hartsfield-Jackson International, Boston's Logan International, Newark Liberty International, Philadelphia International, and Washington, D.C.'s Reagan National were all dealing with delays and cancellations.
